category_sources: Official GitHub README describes FreeSWITCH as a Software Defined Telecom Stack and lists SIP, WebRTC, telephony, and VoIP topics.
source_facts.description says Telephony platform to route various communication protocols.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title and README use FreeSWITCH.
Official documentation site is titled FreeSWITCH Documentation.
docs_sources: Official SignalWire documentation site is the current FreeSWITCH documentation surface.
signalwire/freeswitch-docs README says it is the source for FreeSWITCH documentation published at developer.signalwire.com/freeswitch.
repo_sources: FreeSWITCH users mailing list announcement says the open source repository officially moved to https://github.com/signalwire/freeswitch.
Official GitHub README says FreeSWITCH is available on GitHub in source code format.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists SIP, WebRTC, telephony, and VoIP topics.
source_facts.executables lists freeswitch and related command-line tools.
